description: GetSales.io automates LinkedIn and email outreach for agencies and sales teams, supporting up to 300 sender profiles with built-in account safety features.
tagline: LinkedIn and email outreach automation for sales teams
overview: GetSales.io automates LinkedIn and email outreach at scale, supporting up to 300 sender profiles per plan and using Single Session Protection to mimic real human behavior and reduce account risk. It suits agencies and GTM teams that need unified inbox management, lead enrichment, and pipeline automation in a single platform.
what_is: GetSales.io is a LinkedIn automation platform designed for lead generation agencies and professional sales teams. It allows users to scale LinkedIn outreach safely through Single Session Protection, multiple LinkedIn sender profiles, and account-level automation. The platform claims to be ten times safer than comparable tools by closely mimicking human behavior, and it supports up to 300 profiles per plan.

The tool is at its best when teams want to combine LinkedIn outreach with email campaigns, lead enrichment, and pipeline management in one place. A unified inbox and automated profile rotation let users see traction quickly, making it a strong fit for agencies and GTM teams aiming to increase conversions within a short ramp period.

GetSales.io connects to the broader go-to-market stack through native CRM integrations, webhook events, and a developer API. It also supports enrichment via LinkedIn Sales Navigator and includes email automation features. It is not intended for individual casual users or teams needing a full sales CRM; its focus is on scalable, secure automation and lead outreach.
